name: Initial Setup: Overview
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Proper initial setup ensures your email campaigns reach subscribers' inboxes rather than spam folders, which is essential for campaign effectiveness. Completing DNS configuration, SSL certificates, and IP warm-up processes helps establish sender reputation with email service providers, typically achieving significantly better deliverability rates compared to incomplete setups."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This foundational configuration protects your domain reputation and enables reliable email delivery for your marketing campaigns, helping ensure your messages consistently reach their intended audience and maintain subscriber trust."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before you can start mailing from your Maropost Marketing Cloud account, you will first need to set up several DNS and email items."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following are the mandatory setup items:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/957-dns-setup", "children": [{"text": "DNS Setup", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/956-automatic-provisioning-of-ssl-certificate-for-link-tracking-domains", "children": [{"text": "Automatic Provisioning of SSL Certificate for Link Tracking Domains", "bold": true}]}, {"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0If you've opted for a dedicated IP, you must also do the following setup:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}, {"text": "Dedicated IP Assignment", "bold": true}, {"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/872-a-record", "children": [{"text": "A Record", "bold": true}]}, {"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We strongly recommend that you follow a warm-up plan to build your IP/domain reputation. See\u00a0"}, {"text": "IP and Domain Generic Warm Up", "bold": true}, {"text": " to learn more."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you still need help implementing these setup items, your Customer Success Manager can schedule a call with you to go over them."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
